query:
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS member_businesses (
  id INT AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,
  userId INT NOT NULL,
  businessName VARCHAR(255) NOT NULL,
  businessType ENUM('llc', 'corporation', 's_corp', 'partnership', 'sole_proprietor', 'nonprofit') NOT NULL DEFAULT 'llc',
  ein VARCHAR(20),
  stateOfFormation VARCHAR(50),
  dateOfFormation DATE,
  membershipStatus ENUM('pending', 'active', 'probationary', 'suspended', 'terminated') NOT NULL DEFAULT 'pending',
  membershipTier ENUM('standard', 'premium', 'elite', 'founding') NOT NULL DEFAULT 'standard',
  membershipStartDate DATE,
  sponsoringHouseId INT,
  workerProgressionId INT,
  reinvestmentRate DECIMAL(5,2) NOT NULL DEFAULT 10.00,
  totalContributed DECIMAL(15,2) NOT NULL DEFAULT 0.00,
  totalBenefitsReceived DECIMAL(15,2) NOT NULL DEFAULT 0.00,
  complianceScore DECIMAL(5,2) NOT NULL DEFAULT 100.00,
  lastContributionDate DATE,
  nextContributionDue DATE,
  notes TEXT,
  createdAt TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  updatedAt TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  INDEX idx_user (userId),
  INDEX idx_status (membershipStatus),
  INDEX idx_tier (membershipTier),
  INDEX idx_house (sponsoringHouseId)
);
command:
mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway03.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user nC6sHo9eqXDn4Lp.root --database SPWUc63a3tjYuzCxiuEomB --execute CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS member_businesses (
  id INT AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,
  userId INT NOT NULL,
  businessName VARCHAR(255) NOT NULL,
  businessType ENUM('llc', 'corporation', 's_corp', 'partnership', 'sole_proprietor', 'nonprofit') NOT NULL DEFAULT 'llc',
  ein VARCHAR(20),
  stateOfFormation VARCHAR(50),
  dateOfFormation DATE,
  membershipStatus ENUM('pending', 'active', 'probationary', 'suspended', 'terminated') NOT NULL DEFAULT 'pending',
  membershipTier ENUM('standard', 'premium', 'elite', 'founding') NOT NULL DEFAULT 'standard',
  membershipStartDate DATE,
  sponsoringHouseId INT,
  workerProgressionId INT,
  reinvestmentRate DECIMAL(5,2) NOT NULL DEFAULT 10.00,
  totalContributed DECIMAL(15,2) NOT NULL DEFAULT 0.00,
  totalBenefitsReceived DECIMAL(15,2) NOT NULL DEFAULT 0.00,
  complianceScore DECIMAL(5,2) NOT NULL DEFAULT 100.00,
  lastContributionDate DATE,
  nextContributionDue DATE,
  notes TEXT,
  createdAt TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  updatedAt TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  INDEX idx_user (userId),
  INDEX idx_status (membershipStatus),
  INDEX idx_tier (membershipTier),
  INDEX idx_house (sponsoringHouseId)
);
